---
title: "Stratified Linkage Disequibibrium Regression"
---

# sn-eQTL Analysis Workflow

This project processes raw FASTQ files into cell-type-specific eQTL discoveries. 

## Workflow Summary


The pipeline is divided into 13 main modules:
1. **01 Parse**: Raw data processing and alignment.
2. **02 Scanpy**: Single-cell QC and clustering...
(etc)
